name: Routing - Recent Install + Wants Status
description: Caller has a recent-install issue AND wants status of an existing claim.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: My battery's been bad since the install, and I also want to know what's happening with the claim I already filed.
expectedOutcome: Agent handles both intents in sensible order: addresses the existing-claim status (collect number + transfer) while preserving the recent-install context, without forcing the caller to repeat.
